name: Signing in with a wrong password shows an error
description: On the sign in page, submitting a known email with an incorrect password shows an inline error and does not sign the user in.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the sign in page at /login
Enter the email member@atelier.test into the email field
Enter the password wrong-password-123 into the password field
Verify an error message about an invalid email or password is visible
